title: Graph Matching
description: Interactive demonstrations of graph matching problems including schema matching, resource matching, and entity resolution. Shows how graphs can visualize and optimize matching relationships.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Graph Matching
Schema Matching
Entity Resolution
Resource Allocation
Bipartite Graphs
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of graph matching
Explore graph matching through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of graph matching to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on graph matching
